fields.summary: Integrate update app lifetime using feature implemented in YARN-5611
[Umbrella] Simplified API layer for services and beyond

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

fields.description: The REST API PUT call provides capability to update the lifetime of a running application. Once YARN-5611 is available we need to integrate it.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

03 patch looks good. Committed to yarn-native-services branch.

SUCCESS: Integrated in Jenkins build Hadoop-trunk-Commit #13193 (See [https://builds.apache.org/job/Hadoop-trunk-Commit/13193/])
